title: Robot Awakening
overview: Danny gets dumped by Noa, who finds it difficult to bear his sensibilities. Devastated about her ignoring his calls, he inadvertently discovers that he is not a human being, but in fact, an engineered robot. As he gains confidence to confront her, he finds out that Noa has been kidnapped - and that they're both entangled in a high-tech conspiracy hoping to utilize robot-humans for violence.
